summary: PR #2129 matched and named a large set of mndiagram2 VS Records functions, added Diagram2-related types/headers/static declarations, renamed mndiagram2 symbols in symbols.txt, and back-applied matching learnings to mndiagram formatting, ranking, KO/fall total, and navigation helpers. The PR body says the mndiagram2 names and structs were based on Dolphin debugger validation; bot output reports 21 new matches and 19 unmatched-function improvements.

key_files.role: Main mndiagram2 decompilation work; expanded from a tiny stub-like file to many named functions, helpers, local structs, includes, and documented behavior for VS Records character detail/stat UI.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: match some mndiagram2 functions; document/name all mndiagram2 functions & structs based on validation in dolphin debugger
review_comments: mndiagram2.c hunk showing new functions mnDiagram2_IsTimeStat, mnDiagram2_ClearStatRows, mnDiagram2_UpdateHeader, mnDiagram2_HandleInput
text_corpus: bot report lists mndiagram2 new matches and improvements

key_files.role: Back-applied mndiagram2 learnings to improve existing mndiagram matches, including formatting helpers, total KO/fall helpers, rank helpers, navigation helpers, and some static data.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: apply some learnings from these back to mndiagram as well to improve some of those matches
raw_diff: mnDiagram_FormatTime, mnDiagram_FormatDecimalNumber, mnDiagram_IntToStr, mnDiagram_GetRankedFighterForName changes
text_corpus: bot report lists multiple mndiagram functions reaching 100%

key_files.role: Renamed 21 mndiagram2 address-style/fn_ symbols to semantic names while preserving addresses and sizes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnDiagram2_80243A3C -> mnDiagram2_IsTimeStat; fn_80243D40 -> mnDiagram2_HandleInput; mnDiagram2_80245178 -> mnDiagram2_Create; etc.

key_files.role: Added Diagram2-related type definitions for the menu subsystem.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: document/name all the mndiagram2 functions & structs based on validation in dolphin debugger

key_files.role: Updated public mndiagram2 declarations/prototypes for recovered named functions.
Added static declarations/data references used by mndiagram2 and shared with mndiagram.
Recovered a concrete prototype for gm_80160C90.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: UNK_RET gm_80160C90(UNK_PARAMS) -> void gm_80160C90(HSD_Text* text, u8 fighter_id, s32 arg2)

key_files.role: Header signature adjustments for mndiagram helpers.

what_changed: Renamed mndiagram2 text symbols at 0x80243A3C-0x80245AE4 from address-style names to semantic names such as mnDiagram2_IsTimeStat, mnDiagram2_ClearStatRows, mnDiagram2_HandleInput, mnDiagram2_GetStatValue, mnDiagram2_CreateStatRow, mnDiagram2_Create, and mnDiagram2_ClearDetailView.

Implemented/recovered mndiagram2 functions for stat classification, row clearing/population, header updates, input handling, ranking, scroll arrows, user-data lifecycle, creation/init, and detail-view cleanup.
Added mndiagram2 local/supporting constructs visible in the review hunk, including mnDiagram_GetEntityByIndex, mnDiagram2_SortEntry, JObjContainer, and Diagram2DetailView.
Added Diagram2 forwarding/type/header/static declarations and included mndiagram2.static.h from mndiagram.c.
Updated mndiagram functions to use cleaner loops/indexing and helper extraction for totals, string formatting, time formatting, name/fighter navigation, and ranking logic.
Recovered gm_80160C90 signature from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void gm_80160C90(HSD_Text* text, u8 fighter_id, s32 arg2).
Bot report records +3424 matched code bytes, 21 new matches, and 19 improvements in unmatched functions.

smart_moves.text: Used a related decomp target to improve a sibling file: the PR body explicitly says mndiagram2 work produced learnings that were applied back to mndiagram, and the bot report shows many mndiagram functions reaching 100%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new matches in mndiagram

smart_moves.text: Renamed symbols only alongside recovered code and claimed debugger validation, rather than leaving address-style names for all mndiagram2 functions.
Moved one proven gm function signature from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to a concrete header prototype.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a sibling menu page has analogous behavior, use recovered structure and control-flow learnings from one file to improve matches in the other, but keep the evidence local to the functions changed.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: apply some learnings from these back to mndiagram
text_corpus: mndiagram and mndiagram2 match/improvement report

decomp_lessons.lesson: For repeated digit/string formatting code, cleaner indexed buffer writes and natural loops can replace pointer-walk/decompiler-shaped code while improving matches.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnDiagram_FormatDecimalNumber, mnDiagram_FormatTime, mnDiagram_IntToStr rewritten with for loops and indexed buf writes
text_corpus: these functions reported as new 100% matches

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small wrapper functions can isolate stack-padding or codegen constraints while keeping reusable logic in static inline helpers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnDiagram_GetNameTotalFalls wraps mnDiagram_SumNameFalls with PAD_STACK(16)
raw_diff: mnDiagram_GetFighterTotalFalls wraps mnDiagram_SumFighterFalls with PAD_STACK(16)

decomp_lessons.lesson: Debugger validation can support naming/documenting newly recovered menu structs and functions, but the intake evidence does not independently verify the debugger observations.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: based on validation in dolphin debugger

naming_conventions.convention: mndiagram2 function names use the mnDiagram2_ prefix plus verb/object role names, e.g. IsTimeStat, ClearStatRows, UpdateHeader, HandleInput, GetStatValue, CreateStatRow, PopulateStatRows, UpdateScrollArrows, InitUserData, FreeUserData.
New type names use Diagram2 or mnDiagram2-prefixed names for local concepts, e.g. Diagram2, Diagram2DetailView, mnDiagram2_SortEntry.

Recovered mndiagram helper names describe aggregation or formatting behavior, such as mnDiagram_SumNameFalls, mnDiagram_SumFighterFalls, mnDiagram_FormatDecimalNumber, mnDiagram_FormatTime, and mnDiagram_IntToStr.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used PAD_STACK narrowly in wrapper functions or specific recovered functions where the diff shows stack-shape steering.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR slice shows the tactic and bot match output, but does not include objdiff rationale for each PAD_STACK use.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Changed loop variable types and casts to influence exact codegen, including s32 indices for previous/next navigation and u8 casts or masks for name/fighter data access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnDiagram_GetPrevNameIndex and mnDiagram_GetNextNameIndex signatures change from u8 to s32

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Extracted static inline helpers for repeated or codegen-sensitive logic while keeping public wrapper signatures.
Used a union for 64-bit sorting operations in mndiagram2.
evidence_refs: review_comments: mnDiagram2_SortEntry union with f64/u64 overlays
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The slice shows the union but not the full matching rationale.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.comment: Why not just use the enum values in the `case`?
review_feedback.lesson: Prefer enum constants in switch cases over raw numeric cases when enum values exist and the semantic domain is known.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching src/melee/mn/mndiagram2.c for whether the enum-case review comment was resolved or generalized.
Search for mnDiagram2_SortEntry and Diagram2DetailView in later source to see whether temporary or TODO types were refined.
Search for PAD_STACK in mndiagram.c and mndiagram2.c to identify whether stack-padding wrappers remained necessary after later cleanup.
Search for VSRecordsStatType enum usage in mndiagram2 switch statements.
Search later changes to gm_80160C90 prototype and callsites for confirmation of the recovered signature.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, merge state, changed files, counts
human_pr_text: author intent and Dolphin debugger validation claim
raw_diff: changed code excerpts and symbol/header diffs
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report with match/improvement totals
notes: The diff and review excerpts are truncated, so not every added function/body or header change was inspected.
The bot report gives match/improvement results and byte counts, but the slice does not include per-function objdiff output.
The PR body claims Dolphin debugger validation for names and structs, but the intake packet does not include the debugger notes themselves.
Only one review comment is available; no evidence here proves whether the enum-case suggestion was accepted or changed before merge.
Some local structs include TODO/unknown fields in the excerpt, so their semantics should not be promoted beyond what the PR text and code names support.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Sibling menu pages can inform each other, but apply evidence locally
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2129 explicitly used mndiagram2 matching work to improve mndiagram; bot output shows both files gained matches. Curate as a local historical lesson for mndiagram/mndiagram2 rather than a global rule without more examples.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use enum constants in switch cases when the enum domain is known
accepted_candidate_records.text: Reviewer ribbanya asked why raw cases were not using enum values. This supports a review preference for enum case labels in recovered stat-type switches.

source_update_candidates.title: mndiagram2 path contains VS Records detail/stat UI logic
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2129 recovered and named mndiagram2 functions for VS Records character detail/stat display, including stat classification, input handling, stat row creation/population, ranking, header updates, and detail-view cleanup.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-level search fact, but should be curated against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: mndiagram and mndiagram2 share matching/naming context
source_update_candidates.text: The PR body says mndiagram2 learnings were applied back to mndiagram to improve matches, and the diff shows mndiagram.c including mndiagram2.static.h.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mndiagram.c include and function rewrites
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful for future mndiagram/mndiagram2 lookup, but current source should confirm whether this dependency remains.

source_update_candidates.title: Prefer enum names over numeric switch cases when recovered enum exists
source_update_candidates.text: A review comment on mndiagram2.c asked why the switch cases did not just use enum values. Candidate standard: when the stat/type enum is known, use its named constants in switch cases for reviewability, unless numeric cases are required for matching and documented.
source_update_candidates.reason: Supported by one review comment in this PR; needs broader corroboration before global promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Debugger validation may support naming but should be cited
source_update_candidates.text: The PR body states that mndiagram2 functions and structs were documented/named based on Dolphin debugger validation. Candidate guidance: if debugger/runtime validation is used for decomp naming, preserve enough notes or comments for reviewers/curators to understand what was observed.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR supports the practice in this case, but the actual debugger evidence is absent from the slice.

rejection_notes: Do not promote all mndiagram2 struct field meanings as accepted facts from this slice; several excerpted fields remain xNN/TODO-style and the debugger evidence is not included.
Do not claim every mndiagram2 function fully matched; bot output shows some functions improved but remained below 100%.
Do not infer that PAD_STACK is preferred style here; the slice shows narrow use and match output, but not objdiff rationale for each instance.
Do not infer reviewer intent beyond the literal enum-case question.
